status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.

data.official_name: Decree No. 13/2023/ND-CP on Personal Data Protection
data.notes: Issued by the Government (a decree, not a National Assembly statute) April 17, 2023, effective July 1, 2023. Vietnam's first comprehensive personal-data law, GDPR-influenced, 4 chapters/44 articles, 72-hour breach notification to the Cybersecurity Department (Ministry of Public Security).
